name: Bangladesh Samabaya Bank Limited (BSBL)
description: Bangladesh Samabaya Bank Limited (BSBL) is the apex bank in the co-operative sector of Bangladesh. The members are government, central co-operative banks, land development co-operative banks at district level, other apex co-operative societies and the central co-operative societies situated all over Bangladesh. The functions of BSBL including receiving deposits; issuing bonds, loans, and other agriculture credit to its members; providing loans; and various tasks as and when required by the co-operative department and the government.

name: Habitat for Humanity Bangladesh
description: Habitat for Humanity country or regional office. Sweat-equity homeownership program. See https://habitatbangladesh.org/.

name: National Co-operative Union of Bangladesh (Bangladesh Jatiya Samabaya Union-BJSU)
description: BJSU is the apex federation representing the cooperative movement in Bangladesh.
